design_system.theme_description: Modern, minimalist, and clean e-commerce interface focusing on fashion and apparel. It utilizes high contrast, ample whitespace, and a grid-based layout to emphasize product photography and sales.

background_primary.usage: Main page background, product card backgrounds, top navigation bar

background_secondary.usage: Product image container backgrounds, subtle section dividers

accent_primary.usage: Active filter buttons, prominent CTA buttons, footer background, primary typography

accent_secondary.usage: Flash sale countdown badges, active heart/wishlist icons, discounted pricing

text_dark.usage: Headings, product titles, standard body copy

text_subdued.usage: Original prices (strikethrough), secondary metrics like 'sold' count, inactive filter borders

primary_headings.usage: Hero section titles (e.g., 'Limited Time Offer!'), Section headers ('Flash Sale', 'Todays For You!')

product_text.weight: Regular for titles, Bold for current prices
product_text.usage: Product names, pricing information, store names

microcopy.usage: Top navigation links, ratings, sold quantities, placeholder text in search

layout_and_structure.grid_system: Standard modular grid typical for e-commerce, organizing products into flexible columns (4-5 columns per row in standard views).
layout_and_structure.spacing: Generous padding and margins (whitespace) to create a breathable, uncluttered feel.
layout_and_structure.hero_section: Split layout with bold typography and promotional text on the left, and floating, layered product imagery on the right.
layout_and_structure.categories_bar: Horizontal row of circular icons with centered text below, acting as quick visual filters.

product_cards.container: White background with a very subtle, soft drop shadow on hover/active states.
product_cards.image_area: Light gray background holding the product image, taking up the top 60-70% of the card.
product_cards.actions: Circular floating heart icon in the top right corner of the image area.
product_cards.progress_bar: Thin horizontal bar indicating sale claim progress at the bottom of flash sale cards.

buttons_and_chips.pill_buttons: Fully rounded edges (capsule shape) used for category filters (e.g., 'Best Seller', 'Keep Stylish'). Active states are solid dark navy; inactive states are white with a gray border.
buttons_and_chips.navigation_arrows: Square or slightly rounded square buttons with simple directional arrow icons.

search_bar.style: Wide, full-width central element in the header.
search_bar.features: Rounded corners, internal category dropdown on the left ('All Category'), and a search icon on the right.

countdown_timer.style: Distinctive circular red badges holding white text for hours, minutes, and seconds, separated by dark colons.

imagery_and_art_direction.product_photography: Clean, isolated product shots on transparent or light gray backgrounds to maintain visual consistency. Minimal staging.
imagery_and_art_direction.hero_imagery: Dynamic arrangement of isolated clothing items (t-shirts, sneakers) floating in an isometric or layered composition to create depth without a heavy background.
